description_long: This is a large, cylindrical outdoor trash receptacle made of dark plastic, featuring a slightly flared rim at the top and a fitted black plastic liner bag. The surface is matte and shows signs of wear, with some scuff marks and dirt near the base. A white stenciled message reading 'HELP KEEP YOUR PARK CLEAN' is prominently displayed on one side, indicating its use in public park settings. A metal chain is attached to the rim, likely for securing the lid or the bin itself. The top is covered, but the cover appears to be a flexible liner rather than a rigid lid. The overall construction is utilitarian, designed for durability and ease of maintenance in outdoor environments.
description: A large, dark plastic outdoor trash bin with a black liner, white stenciled text, and a metal chain attached to the rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white stenciled 'HELP KEEP YOUR PARK CLEAN' text and the attached metal chain.
description_view_1: Side view with the stenciled text partially visible and the rim and liner bag clearly shown.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible text, showing the plain dark plastic surface and the liner bag.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the metal chain attached to the rim and the unmarked surface.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: white stenciled text 'HELP KEEP YOUR PARK CLEAN'
